overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a foggy, neon-lit Night City street at night. The environment transitions from an open sidewalk with large digital billboards to a covered pedestrian walkway lined with vibrant neon advertisements and overhead digital screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban sidewalk with large digital billboards

events.description: large Mister billboard with clown face passes out of view on the left
approaching intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic lights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy sidewalk past trees and large advertisements

entered.detail: large vertical billboard featuring a grinning clown face with green background
tall leafy tree lining the sidewalk
covered bus stop structure with glass panels
zebra-striped pedestrian crossing on the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy Night City street with a large Mister billboard prominent on the left. The camera walks forward along a concrete sidewalk lined with trees, passing a bus shelter as it approaches a crosswalk. The atmosphere is hazy with warm orange ambient lighting mixed with artificial street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway entrance with overhead digital displays

events.description: entering covered pedestrian walkway with overhead concrete structure
ambient lighting shifts to dominant neon glow from overhead digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered arcade area beneath overhead digital displays and neon signs

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure with embedded digital screens and lighting
metal fence running along the left side of the walkway
vertical neon sign with cyan lettering for Chillax establishment
large overhead digital advertisement for All Foods with red flower graphic

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered pedestrian walkway as the open street gives way to an overhead concrete structure. The lighting shifts to a vibrant neon ambiance from digital billboards overhead, including a prominent All Foods advertisement. A chain-link fence runs along the left side while pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial corridor with overhead digital advertisements and neon storefronts

events.description: passing various neon storefront signs including Watson Whore and Brooklyn Arista

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered walkway beneath vibrant neon signs and digital billboards

entered.detail: large pink neon sign reading Watson Whore for an adult establishment
vertical yellow neon sign for Brooklyn Arista
overhead digital screen displaying health warning text
overhead advertisement showing Body Without Limits text with figure
yellow signage for a pawn shop

segments.scene_description: Deep within the covered walkway, the corridor is lined with dense neon signage including the prominent Watson Whore and Brooklyn Arista signs. Overhead digital billboards display various advertisements including health warnings and Body Without Limits. The environment is fully sheltered with no sky visible, illuminated entirely by artificial neon and digital displays.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a hazy, open city street into a vibrant, neon-lit pedestrian corridor. It begins on a foggy sidewalk under warm orange ambient lighting, passing a large Mister billboard and a bus shelter while moving toward a crosswalk. As the camera advances, the open street gives way to a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a heavy concrete overhead structure. The atmosphere then shifts from a misty glow to a vivid neon ambiance, dominated by overhead digital screens and a prominent All Foods advertisement. The scene concludes as the camera follows other pedestrians forward, moving alongside a chain-link fence deep within the illuminated walkway.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a claustrophobic, neon-drenched pedestrian corridor. It begins deep within the covered walkway, where the camera glides past a dense array of glowing signage including the Watson Whore and Brooklyn Arista displays. As the movement progresses, the perspective shifts upward to reveal overhead digital billboards flashing health warnings and Body Without Limits advertisements. The scene remains fully sheltered from the outside world, with the artificial light of the digital screens providing the sole illumination for the surrounding environment.
